name: stele
description: Local-first knowledge base. Carved to last.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @stele/editor-core exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @stele/desktop exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @stele/sync exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @stele/server exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @stele/viewer exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm licenses:check
